passes: Root/Core, GitHub, Nexus release, and BETA latest all resolve to v2.4.13-beta.14.
GitHub exposes the published 10-asset inventory; Nexus exposes preferred darwin/arm64, linux/x64, and win32/x64 assets.
GitHub and Nexus host downloads are byte-identical to manifest/GitHub SHA-256.
All three Nexus signed download endpoints return valid redirects; the host download reaches binary bytes.
Downloaded app version, arm64 architecture, and executable mode match the target.
Isolated packaged probe passed: renderer/CDP, Settings, file-index diagnostics, detail dialog, and audit-field verification.

failures.detail: Core signature fields are missing; linux/x64 is duplicated; macOS and Windows names fail the canonical-name validator.
GitHub has no signature sidecars; Nexus assets have no signatureUrl; all three signature endpoints return 404; signing public key is not configured.
The bundle is ad-hoc signed with no TeamIdentifier and deep strict codesign verification fails on the embedded Electron framework bundle.
Repository-local zh/en update note files for 2.4.13-beta.14 are absent, although Nexus remote notes and notesHtml pass.

blocked.detail: spctl reports override=security disabled, so this machine cannot provide a valid Gatekeeper pass/fail assessment.
